2	
3	## `@ai-sdk/<provider>` vs 3rd party package
4	
5	Every provider is welcome to create a 3rd party package. We are happy to link to it from our documentation.
6	
7	If you would prefer a 1st party `@ai-sdk/<provider>` package, please create an issue first to discuss.
8	
9	## Example
10	
11	https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/8136/files
12	
13	## How
14	
15	1. Create new folder `packages/<provider>`
16	2. Set version in `packages/<provider>/package.json` to `0.0.0`
17	3. Create changeset for new package with `major`
18	4. Add examples to `examples/ai-functions/src/*/<provider>.ts` depending on what model types the provider supports
19	5. Add documentation in `content/providers/01-ai-sdk-providers/<last number + 10>-<provider>.mdx`
20	
21	See also [providers.md](providers.md)
22	
23	## When in pre-release mode
24	
25	If `main` is set up to publish `beta` releases, no further action is necessary. Just make sure not to backport it to the `vX.Y` stable branch since it will result in an npm version conflict once we exit pre-release mode on `main`
26

1	# Provider Development Notes
2	
3	## Provider Options Schemas
4	
5	Provider options schemas are user facing.
6	We want them to be as restrictive as possible, so that we have more flexibility with future changes and allow for meaningful `null` values.
7	
8	- use `.optional()` unless `null` is meaningful
9	
10	## Response Schemas
11	
12	Response schemas need to be flexible enough to deal with provider API changes that do not affect our processing
13	to prevent unnecessary breakages.
14	
15	- keep them minimal (no unused properties)
16	- use `.nullish()` instead of `.optional()`
17	
18	## Provider-Specific Model Options Types
19	
20	Types and Zod schemas for the provider specific model options follow the pattern `{Provider}{ModelType}Options`, e.g. `AnthropicLanguageModelOptions`.
21	If a provider has multiple implementations for the same model type, add a qualifier: `{Provider}{ModelType}{Qualifier}Options`, e.g. `OpenAILanguageModelChatOptions` and `OpenAILanguageModelResponsesOptions`.
22	If options apply provider-wide rather than to a specific model type, use `{Provider}ProviderOptions` instead, e.g. `GatewayProviderOptions`.
23	
24	- types are PascalCase, Zod schemas are camelCase (e.g. `openaiLanguageModelChatOptions`)
25	- types must be exported from the provider package, Zod schemas must not
26	
27	## Provider Method Names
28	
29	For the Provider v3 interface, we require fully specified names with a "Model" suffix, e.g. `languageModel(id)` or `imageModel(id)`. These help with clarity for both developers and agents.
30

219	/**
220	 * Distributes input token details evenly across images, with the remainder
221	 * assigned to the last image so that summing across all entries gives the
222	 * exact total.
223	 */
224	function distributeTokenDetails(
225	  details:
226	    | { image_tokens?: number | null; text_tokens?: number | null }
227	    | null
228	    | undefined,
229	  index: number,
230	  total: number,
231	): { imageTokens?: number; textTokens?: number } {
232	  if (details == null) {
233	    return {};
234	  }
235	
236	  const result: { imageTokens?: number; textTokens?: number } = {};
237	
238	  if (details.image_tokens != null) {
239	    const base = Math.floor(details.image_tokens / total);
240	    const remainder = details.image_tokens - base * (total - 1);
241	    result.imageTokens = index === total - 1 ? remainder : base;
242	  }
243	
244	  if (details.text_tokens != null) {
245	    const base = Math.floor(details.text_tokens / total);
246	    const remainder = details.text_tokens - base * (total - 1);
247	    result.textTokens = index === total - 1 ? remainder : base;
248	  }
249	
250	  return result;
251	}

334	async function fileToBlob(
335	  file: ImageModelV3File | undefined,
336	): Promise<Blob | undefined> {
337	  if (!file) return undefined;
338	
339	  if (file.type === 'url') {
340	    return downloadBlob(file.url);
341	  }
342	
343	  const data =
344	    file.data instanceof Uint8Array
345	      ? file.data
346	      : convertBase64ToUint8Array(file.data);
347	
348	  return new Blob([data as BlobPart], { type: file.mediaType });
349	}

1	# Provider Abstraction Architecture
2	
3	This document explains how AI functions, model specifications, and provider implementations connect in the AI SDK.
4	It starts with an abstract high-level view and then details each V3 model type, including the AI functions that use it and small UML diagrams.
5	
6	## High-Level Architecture
7	
8	- **AI functions**: user-facing language functions (for example, `streamText`)
9	- **Model specification**: `LanguageModelV3`
10	- **Provider implementations**: provider-specific language model implementations of `LanguageModelV3`
11	
12	```mermaid
13	classDiagram
14	    class AIFunction
15	    class LanguageModelV3 {
16	      <<interface>>
17	    }
18	    class ProviderLanguageModelImplementationA
19	    class ProviderLanguageModelImplementationB
20	
21	    AIFunction ..> LanguageModelV3 : uses
22	    ProviderLanguageModelImplementationA ..|> LanguageModelV3 : implements
23	    ProviderLanguageModelImplementationB ..|> LanguageModelV3 : implements
24	```
25	
26	## Model-Type Details
27	
28	If you're unable to find any of the functions mentioned below in the codebase, they may only exist with an `experimental_` prefix. This means they're experimental, and stable versions will likely be implemented at a later point.
29	
30	### Language Model (`LanguageModelV3`)
31	
32	Language models are used for text generation and structured generation workflows from prompt or message input.
33	
34	- **AI functions**
35	  - `generateText` - [`packages/ai/src/generate-text/generate-text.ts`](packages/ai/src/generate-text/generate-text.ts) - Generates a complete text result from a language model in a single call.
36	  - `streamText` - [`packages/ai/src/generate-text/stream-text.ts`](packages/ai/src/generate-text/stream-text.ts) - Streams language model output incrementally as it is produced.
37	- **Model specification**
38	  - `LanguageModelV3` - [`packages/provider/src/language-model/v3/language-model-v3.ts`](packages/provider/src/language-model/v3/language-model-v3.ts)
39	- **Provider implementations (examples)**
40	  - [`OpenAIChatLanguageModel`](packages/openai/src/chat/openai-chat-language-model.ts), [`AnthropicMessagesLanguageModel`](packages/anthropic/src/anthropic-messages-language-model.ts)
41	
42	```mermaid
43	classDiagram
44	    class generateText
45	    class streamText
46	    class LanguageModelV3 {
47	      <<interface>>
48	    }
49	    class OpenAILanguageModel
50	
51	    generateText ..> LanguageModelV3 : uses
52	    streamText ..> LanguageModelV3 : uses
53	    OpenAILanguageModel ..|> LanguageModelV3 : implements
54	```
55	
56	### Embedding Model (`EmbeddingModelV3`)
57	
58	Embedding models are used to convert text into numeric vectors for similarity and retrieval use cases.
59	
60	- **AI functions**
61	  - `embed` - [`packages/ai/src/embed/embed.ts`](packages/ai/src/embed/embed.ts) - Creates a single embedding vector for one text value.
62	  - `embedMany` - [`packages/ai/src/embed/embed-many.ts`](packages/ai/src/embed/embed-many.ts) - Creates embedding vectors for multiple text values, batching calls when needed.
63	- **Model specification**
64	  - `EmbeddingModelV3` - [`packages/provider/src/embedding-model/v3/embedding-model-v3.ts`](packages/provider/src/embedding-model/v3/embedding-model-v3.ts)
65	- **Provider implementations (examples)**
66	  - [`OpenAIEmbeddingModel`](packages/openai/src/embedding/openai-embedding-model.ts), [`MistralEmbeddingModel`](packages/mistral/src/mistral-embedding-model.ts)
67	
68	```mermaid
69	classDiagram
70	    class embed
71	    class embedMany
72	    class EmbeddingModelV3 {
73	      <<interface>>
74	    }
75	    class OpenAIEmbeddingModel
76	
77	    embed ..> EmbeddingModelV3 : uses
78	    embedMany ..> EmbeddingModelV3 : uses
79	    OpenAIEmbeddingModel ..|> EmbeddingModelV3 : implements
80	```
81	
82	### Image Model (`ImageModelV3`)
83	
84	Image models are used to generate image outputs from text prompts.
85	
86	- **AI functions**
87	  - `generateImage` - [`packages/ai/src/generate-image/generate-image.ts`](packages/ai/src/generate-image/generate-image.ts) - Generates one or more images from prompt input.
88	- **Model specification**
89	  - `ImageModelV3` - [`packages/provider/src/image-model/v3/image-model-v3.ts`](packages/provider/src/image-model/v3/image-model-v3.ts)
90	- **Provider implementations (examples)**
91	  - [`OpenAIImageModel`](packages/openai/src/image/openai-image-model.ts), [`GoogleGenerativeAIImageModel`](packages/google/src/google-generative-ai-image-model.ts)
92	
93	```mermaid
94	classDiagram
95	    class generateImage
96	    class ImageModelV3 {
97	      <<interface>>
98	    }
99	    class OpenAIImageModel
100	
101	    generateImage ..> ImageModelV3 : uses
102	    OpenAIImageModel ..|> ImageModelV3 : implements
103	```
104	
105	### Reranking Model (`RerankingModelV3`)
106	
107	Reranking models are used to reorder candidate documents by relevance to a query.
108	
109	- **AI functions**
110	  - `rerank` - [`packages/ai/src/rerank/rerank.ts`](packages/ai/src/rerank/rerank.ts) - Reorders documents and returns a relevance-ranked result set for a query.
111	- **Model specification**
112	  - `RerankingModelV3` - [`packages/provider/src/reranking-model/v3/reranking-model-v3.ts`](packages/provider/src/reranking-model/v3/reranking-model-v3.ts)
113	- **Provider implementations (examples)**
114	  - [`CohereRerankingModel`](packages/cohere/src/reranking/cohere-reranking-model.ts), [`BedrockRerankingModel`](packages/amazon-bedrock/src/reranking/bedrock-reranking-model.ts)
115	
116	```mermaid
117	classDiagram
118	    class rerank
119	    class RerankingModelV3 {
120	      <<interface>>
121	    }
122	    class CohereRerankingModel
123	
124	    rerank ..> RerankingModelV3 : uses
125	    CohereRerankingModel ..|> RerankingModelV3 : implements
126	```
127	
128	### Transcription Model (`TranscriptionModelV3`)
129	
130	Transcription models are used to convert audio input into text transcripts.
131	
132	- **AI functions**
133	  - `transcribe` - [`packages/ai/src/transcribe/transcribe.ts`](packages/ai/src/transcribe/transcribe.ts) - Transcribes audio into text with segment and metadata support.
134	- **Model specification**
135	  - `TranscriptionModelV3` - [`packages/provider/src/transcription-model/v3/transcription-model-v3.ts`](packages/provider/src/transcription-model/v3/transcription-model-v3.ts)
136	- **Provider implementations (examples)**
137	  - [`OpenAITranscriptionModel`](packages/openai/src/transcription/openai-transcription-model.ts), [`DeepgramTranscriptionModel`](packages/deepgram/src/deepgram-transcription-model.ts)
138	
139	```mermaid
140	classDiagram
141	    class transcribe
142	    class TranscriptionModelV3 {
143	      <<interface>>
144	    }
145	    class OpenAITranscriptionModel
146	
147	    transcribe ..> TranscriptionModelV3 : uses
148	    OpenAITranscriptionModel ..|> TranscriptionModelV3 : implements
149	```
150

## `@ai-sdk/pixelart` — Implementation Complete

### Files created (13 new files)

**Package scaffolding:**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `packages/pixelart/package.json` | `@ai-sdk/pixelart` v0.0.0, dual CJS/ESM exports, workspace deps |
| `packages/pixelart/tsconfig.json` | Extends `@vercel/ai-tsconfig`, refs `../provider` & `../provider-utils` |
| `packages/pixelart/tsconfig.build.json` | Same as above with `composite: false` for tsup |
| `packages/pixelart/tsup.config.ts` | Builds CJS + ESM + `.d.ts` from `src/index.ts` |
| `packages/pixelart/turbo.json` | Inherits root turborepo config |
| `packages/pixelart/vitest.node.config.js` | Node test environment |
| `packages/pixelart/vitest.edge.config.js` | Edge runtime test environment |

**Source files (`src/`):**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `version.ts` | Build-injected `VERSION` constant |
| `pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId` union type (`pixel-art-v1`, `pixel-art-v2`, `retro-8bit-v1`) |
| `pixelart-image-options.ts` | Zod schema + `PixelArtImageModelOptions` type (`style`, `pixelDensity`) |
| `pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3` — POSTs to `/images/generate`, downloads `Uint8Array` images from returned URLs |
| `pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory + `pixelArt` default instance; non-image model methods throw `NoSuchModelError` |
| `src/index.ts` | Public re-exports |

**Modified file (1):**
- `tsconfig.json` (root) — added `{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }` alphabetically between `perplexity` and `provider`

### Usage
```typescript
import { createPixelArt } from '@ai-sdk/pixelart';
import { generateImage } from 'ai';

const { images } = await generateImage({
  model: createPixelArt({ apiKey: '...' }).image('pixel-art-v1'),
  prompt: 'A castle in an enchanted forest',
  size: '512x512',
  providerOptions: {
    pixelart: { style: '8bit', pixelDensity: 4 },
  },
});
```
